Bug / Task Description: Add JWT-based authentication to the WebSocket messaging layer and retire the legacy REST messaging endpoints. WebSocket connections must authenticate using the same JWT scheme as the HTTP API before they can send or receive messages; unauthenticated or invalid-token connections must be rejected. The connection hub must track authenticated connections and associate them with the right user, and lobby chat must enforce that only authenticated members can post. Remove the legacy REST messaging endpoints in server/api/routers/messaging.py in favor of the WebSocket flow. The backend test suite under server/tests (including the messaging API and WebSocket tests) must pass; preserve existing authentication semantics and public message shapes.
Commit Subject: added websocket auth & cleaned legacy REST
